evidence.detail: Bot detector shows 0.91% average engagement rate, which falls within the expected 0.5-1.5% range for accounts with 24,369 followers in the macro tier
fakeInfluencerScore of 0.0 and botScore of 0.0 with humanScore of 1.0 indicate authentic account with organic followers
Follows 368 accounts with 24,369 followers (ratio 66.2:1), indicating selective following behavior consistent with genuine influencer
885 posts over established account history with consistent athletic/sports theme around skiing and surfing, showing genuine content creation
Account is verified and marked as business account in athlete category, indicating platform recognition
Recent posts show genuine engagement with 1-59 comments per post, including thoughtful responses from followers about her athletic journey
